variables.notes: No operating depreciation/amortisation row is visible above the financial section, and no COGS row was previously selected. Therefore there is no separate COGS-related D&A row to add.

No operating depreciation/amortisation row is visible in the excerpt above the financial section. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows therefore appear to already stand on their own without any separate D&A line to add. Also, because 'Research and development' is explicitly present and already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, there is no basis to add any R&D-related amortisation separately.
